changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization WHERE name = 'Centre ARV Hopital General'

changeSet.comment: Seed organization: Centre ARV Hopital General
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization(id, name, short_name, is_active, lastupdated, fhir_uuid) VALUES (nextval('organization_seq'), 'Centre ARV Hopital General', '01', 'Y', now(), gen_random_uuid()::text);

changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_organization_type oot JOIN clinlims.organization o ON o.id = oot.org_id JOIN clinlims.organization_type ot ON ot.id = oot.org_type_id WHERE o.name = 'Centre ARV Hopital General' AND ot.short_name = 'ARV Service Loc'

changeSet.comment: Link Centre ARV Hopital General to organization type ARV Service Loc
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_organization_type(org_id, org_type_id) SELECT o.id, ot.id FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.organization_type ot WHERE o.name = 'Centre ARV Hopital General' AND ot.short_name = 'ARV Service Loc';

changeSet.author: study-entry-seed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_organization_type oot JOIN clinlims.organization o ON o.id = oot.org_id JOIN clinlims.organization_type ot ON ot.id = oot.org_type_id WHERE o.name = 'Centre ARV CHU Yopougon' AND ot.short_name = 'ARV Service Loc'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.organization_organization_type(org_id, org_type_id) SELECT o.id, ot.id FROM clinlims.organization o, clinlims.organization_type ot WHERE o.name = 'Centre ARV CHU Yopougon' AND ot.short_name = 'ARV Service Loc';

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.organization_organization_type oot JOIN clinlims.organization o ON o.id = oot.org_id JOIN clinlims.organization_type ot ON ot.id = oot.org_type_id WHERE o.name = 'Site EID ACONDA Abidjan' AND ot.short_name = 'EID ACONDA-VS CI'
